title: After the Japanese Derby: Live It Up, Even in Defeat!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm never, ever, evereverEVER!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Going to let you win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What... What was that running just now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sees a star—a shooting comet so bright it
makes the glittering lights of the Mejiro family
seem like mere haze in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ehe... hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin expended so much of her energy in that
all-out sprint, she doesn't even have the breath
left to thank the cheering crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is that... what a real breakaway looks like?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's the kind of drive you need to win a 2,400-meter race at Tokyo... That was amazing... It was too amazing...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: ...I-nes! I-nes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A chant begins to swell up from the stands until it
builds to a deafening roar.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: I-nes! I-nes!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: I-nes! I-nes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh. Trainer... Sorry I couldn't win.
choice_data_list: It's all right. Ines was just so strong.
It's all right. Ines was just so strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... But I'm a racer too. I shouldn't be happy
for someone else's victory...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I can't keep being a good person who keeps
everyone else's interest at heart, but... But!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I want to be that person just for today after
getting to see that unbelievable running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: I-nes! I-nes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, everybody! Let's cheer even louder for
her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I-nes, wahey! I-NES, WAHEY!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Spectators
text_block_list.text: I-NES, WAHEY! I-NES, WAHEY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer hypes up the crowd even further
and the chant reaches a fever pitch. The
celebratory cheers ring out into infinity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see. ☆ If I run the way Ines did today...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: And my bestie slays the getaway...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What's up, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. An idea just hit me, and I was tryna
work it out! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's a pretty god-tier plan, but it could also be a
total bust! ♪ But enough of that. C'mon, let's
keep the party going!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let me just shake up this can of soda... ☆ Pop the
tab...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Drop in a couple of Menthos candies and! ★★★
Woohooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa, holy crap! Girl, the soda's spraying
everywhere! Omigo—pffft!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bubbly after-party to celebrate the Derby
lasts long into the night.
